decision_summary: Approve v6.9 as Executable Pre-Implementation Quality Gates.
rationale: v6.8 made quality evidence auditable after it exists; the next leverage point is blocking implementation readiness until goal, loss boundary, acceptance gates, evidence plan, maker/checker separation, and stop conditions are explicit.
recommendation: Open TASK-082 for the smallest work-readiness record and audit surface; defer multi-actor orchestration to a later v7-class frontier.
target_audience: AOF operator selecting the next bounded release frontier after v6.8.0.
expected_user_reaction: The operator should understand that v6.9 makes work expectations executable before implementation begins.
